poolId.description: Stable identifier of the pool or runner group.

poolName.description: Display name of the pool or runner group.

instanceId.description: Stable identifier of the ready agent or runner instance.

instanceName.description: Display name or hostname for the instance.

warmupDurationMs.description: Optional startup warm-up duration in milliseconds.

details.description: Provider-specific metadata for this lifecycle event, such as registration context or capability flags.
